sections.paragraph:
a root not used in Hebrew. Arab. أَفَلَ is-

(1) pr. to set as the sun (comp. the kindred roots אָבַל, נָבַל, נָפַלּ), to be obscure, dark.

(2) to fail, to be weak, tender, specially used of backward plants. The former signification is found in the derived nouns אָפֵל, אֹפֶלּ, אֲפֵלָה, מַאֲפֵלּ, מַאְפֵּלְיָה, the latter in אָפִיל.
